title: Early Initiated Vasopressor Therapy in the Emergency Department

skipped_criteria: Signs or suspicion of hypotension/shock defined via MAP < 65 mmHg: MAP is not an available field in the schema.
Lactate > 2.0 mmol/L combined with SBP/MAP thresholds: lactate is not an available field in the schema.
Physician-defined blood pressure threshold for individual patient: requires clinical judgment not expressible in schema fields.
Received at least 500ml of IV fluid before study inclusion within the first 4 hours of ED arrival: fluid administration volume and timing are not available fields.
Clinical Frailty Score (CFS) ≤4 (or ≥5 with ICU eligibility confirmed): CFS is not an available field in the schema.
Cardiogenic or anaphylactic shock suspected by treating physician: no schema field distinguishes these shock subtypes (only hemorrhagic is partially covered by presumed_hemorrhage).
Neurogenic shock suspected by treating physician: no schema field for neurogenic shock subtype.
Patient deemed terminally ill or with severe co-morbidity resulting in non-eligibility for ICU admittance: no schema field for terminal illness or ICU eligibility status.
Known allergy to noradrenaline: medication allergy history is not an available field in the schema.
Fertile women breastfeeding excluded: breastfeeding status is not an available field in the schema.

Fertile women < 60 years with positive urine/plasma hCG excluded: hCG test result is not an available field; pregnancy_status partially covers this but cannot encode the age-based fertility qualifier or hCG confirmation.
